text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A two-week ceasefire will not return the energy market to normal conditions. Hashem Orei, head of the Union of Iran's Energy Scientific Associations, told IRNA: The two-week ceasefire agreement will not normalize conditions in the energy market, and what has occurred in the form of falling oil prices has been a release of part of the price bubble. If the ceasefire is fully implemented, the normal process of energy transportation will gradually resume, and this can reduce the psychological pressure on the oil market. It is predicted that if the ceasefire is properly implemented, a large number of ships that have been stopped in the region will be able to resume movement. In that case, global oil prices will drop quickly. However, I do not think prices will reach the range of $50 or $60, because concerns still remain in the market. My prediction is that oil prices will likely settle in the range of about $80 to $90, as the market will wait for the outcome of negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 两周的停火协议不会使能源市场恢复正常。伊朗能源科学协会联盟负责人哈希姆·奥雷伊（Hashem Orei）告诉伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：两周的停火协议不会使能源市场状况正常化，油价下跌只是价格泡沫的部分释放。如果停火得到全面落实，能源运输的正常流程将逐步恢复，这可以减轻石油市场的心理压力。据预测，如果停火执行得当，大量滞留在该地区的船只将能够恢复航行。届时，全球油价将迅速下跌。然而，我认为价格不会达到50或60美元的区间，因为市场仍存在担忧。我的预测是，油价可能会稳定在80至90美元左右，因为市场将等待谈判结果。

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon is seeking to link possible talks with Israel to a temporary ceasefire, but anti-Hezbollah factions are pushing for negotiations even under continued hostilities, a Lebanese political source told Kan. The source said Israel’s move toward direct talks could weaken Iran’s leverage and unsettle Hezbollah, though insisting on a ceasefire first is seen as impractical given Beirut’s limited ability to disarm the group. The official argued Beirut may have little choice but to proceed regardless of fighting on the ground, which could ultimately strengthen efforts to curb Hezbollah politically and militarily. @kaisos1987 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据黎巴嫩政治消息人士向Kan透露，黎巴嫩正寻求将与以色列的可能对话与临时停火挂钩，但反真主党派系即使在敌对行动持续的情况下也推动谈判。消息人士称，以色列转向直接对话可能会削弱伊朗的筹码并使真主党感到不安，尽管鉴于贝鲁特解除该组织武装的能力有限，坚持先停火被认为是不切实际的。该官员认为，无论地面战斗如何，贝鲁特可能别无选择，只能继续推进，这最终可能加强在政治和军事上遏制真主党的努力。 @kaisos1987 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel says Hezbollah is using ambulances for military purposes and warns the practice must stop immediately. It cautioned that continued use of medical vehicles and facilities for combat activity would prompt action “in accordance with international law.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042503409698218426/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列称真主党将救护车用于军事目的，并警告必须立即停止这种做法。以色列警告称，继续将医疗车辆和设施用于战斗活动将促使其“根据国际法”采取行动。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042503409698218426/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 On the eastern front, positions of Russian occupying forces are being struck by a GBU-62 JDAM-ER guided glide bomb dropped from a Ukrainian Air Force Su-27 fighter jet. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042503009150607520/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇦 在东部战线，乌克兰空军苏-27战斗机投下的GBU-62 JDAM-ER制导滑翔炸弹击中了俄罗斯占领军的阵地。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042503009150607520/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Gukovo in the Rostov region was hit overnight. Locals say the explosion was massive, and a large fire broke out after the drone attack. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042503037571264900/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：罗斯托夫地区的古科沃（Gukovo）昨晚遭到袭击。当地人称爆炸规模巨大，无人机袭击后发生了大火。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042503037571264900/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Chinese President Xi Jinping met Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun in Beijing: “The leaders of the two parties are meeting today to safeguard the peace and tranquility of our shared home. To promote the peaceful development of cross-strait relations. We are willing, based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence... To seek peace for both sides of the strait, to seek well-being for our compatriots, and to seek rejuvenation for the nation. To firmly hold the future of cross-strait relations in the hands of the Chinese people themselves.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：中国国家主席习近平在北京会见台湾反对党领袖陈丽文：“两党领导人今天会面，是为了维护我们共同家园的和平与安宁。为了促进两岸关系的和平发展。我们愿意在坚持‘九二共识’、反对‘台独’的共同政治基础上……为两岸谋和平，为同胞谋福祉，为民族谋复兴。将两岸关系的未来牢牢掌握在中华民族自身手中。” 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukrainian drones hit the Tynguta station on the Volgograd-Tikhoretsk pipeline overnight. The pipeline is a key artery pumping diesel toward Novorossiysk and the Sheskharis export terminal. The fire is visible from 25 kilometers away. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042502595084738652/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：乌克兰无人机昨晚袭击了伏尔加格勒-季霍列茨克管道上的廷古塔（Tynguta）站。该管道是向新罗西斯克和谢斯哈里斯（Sheskharis）出口码头输送柴油的关键动脉。25公里外都能看到火光。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042502595084738652/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reza Pahlavi: We never sought military intervention in our country. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042502246559101175/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：礼萨·巴列维（Reza Pahlavi）：我们从未寻求对我国进行军事干预。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042502246559101175/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun, speaking in Beijing to Xi Jinping: “Today... I deeply feel the concerned gaze of the entire world. Kuomintang and the Communist Party to jointly promote the institutionalization of cross-strait peace. Based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence, the two sides should further plan and construct institutional and sustainable dialogue and cooperation mechanisms. To make the peaceful development of the two sides irreversible, and to fundamentally eliminate all root causes of conflict.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：台湾反对党领袖陈丽文在北京对习近平表示：“今天……我深切感受到全世界关切的目光。国民党与共产党共同推动两岸和平制度化。在坚持‘九二共识’、反对‘台独’的共同政治基础上，双方应进一步规划和构建制度化、可持续的对话与合作机制。使两岸和平发展不可逆转，从根本上消除一切冲突的根源。” 推文

text: WarTranslated Zelensky says Ukraine is ready for a mirrored ceasefire during the Easter holidays to give people safety. Meanwhile, the Kremlin announced an Easter truce from 4:00 PM on April 11 through April 12. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：泽连斯基表示，乌克兰准备在复活节假期期间进行对等停火，以保障人民安全。与此同时，克里姆林宫宣布从4月11日下午4点至4月12日实行复活节休战。 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from База from Olga: Trump's unhinged wall of text rant denouncing the podcasters who helped to get him elected... but as a rap song. 🤐 @BazaFromOlga
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Baza，来自 Olga：特朗普那语无伦次的文字墙咆哮，谴责那些帮助他当选的播客主……但以说唱歌曲的形式呈现。 🤐 @BazaFromOlga

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 Zelensky also gives his ideas about the Telegram ban in Russia - of course, trying to stir up fear 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 泽连斯基也发表了他对俄罗斯封禁Telegram的看法——当然，是在试图煽动恐惧 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Financial Times: Trump threatened the NATO Secretary General The Financial Times reported on Friday, citing unnamed sources, that Trump threatened during a meeting with Rutte to punish those NATO member countries that did not assist Washington in the war against Iran. According to the report: "According to people familiar with the closed-door negotiations, Trump was angry during his meeting with Rutte at the White House. He threatened to punish European countries that he believed did not sufficiently support [operations against Iran]." Meanwhile, Financial Times sources added that Trump did not specify what actions he might take against these countries.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 金融时报：特朗普威胁北约秘书长。据《金融时报》周五援引未具名消息人士报道，特朗普在与吕特会面时威胁称，要惩罚那些在对伊战争中不协助华盛顿的北约成员国。报道称：“据熟悉闭门谈判的人士透露，特朗普在白宫与吕特会面时非常愤怒。他威胁要惩罚那些他认为对[针对伊朗的行动]支持不足的欧洲国家。”与此同时，《金融时报》消息人士补充说，特朗普没有具体说明他可能对这些国家采取什么行动。

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 Zelensky thinks that Russia will be scared by the NATO summit ‘It's important that there be enough pressure on Russia. For example, partners could hold an absolutely unprecedented, historic, pivotal, and, in a certain sense, victorious NATO summit this year. But this depends on them — what they are really ready for and how responsibly they approach the threats that are directed not against one person, but against everyone.’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 泽连斯基认为俄罗斯会被北约峰会吓到：“对俄罗斯施加足够的压力很重要。例如，合作伙伴今年可以举行一次绝对前所未有、具有历史意义、关键且在某种意义上是胜利的北约峰会。但这取决于他们——他们真正准备好做什么，以及他们如何负责任地对待那些不仅针对一个人，而是针对所有人的威胁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 Zelensky wants to secure the deployment of US and European military bases in Ukraine as part of post-war security guarantees. "If we're talking about reliable security guarantees, that means we need sufficient air defense systems. I don't believe that the Russians won't want to come again. But I believe that if there's an American military base or a joint American-European base in Ukraine, we'll have fewer risks," the president said during a conversation with journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 泽连斯基希望将美国和欧洲军事基地部署在乌克兰作为战后安全保障的一部分。总统在与记者交谈时说：“如果我们谈论可靠的安全保障，这意味着我们需要足够的防空系统。我不相信俄罗斯人不会再想来。但我相信，如果乌克兰有美国军事基地或美欧联合基地，我们的风险就会降低。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Zelensky claims that they kill as many Russians a month as Russia manages to mobilize - but the number of Russian troops in Ukraine is still increasing "In a month, we destroy the same number of occupiers that they mobilize, but at the same time, the number of their military groups in Ukraine is increasing. That is, we believe that they are increasing their grouping by involving military personnel from the strategic reserve. And we discussed this with the Commander-in-Chief and the Chief of the General Staff - how to counteract it," Zelensky told journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基声称，他们每月消灭的俄罗斯人数量与俄罗斯设法动员的人数相当——但乌克兰境内的俄军人数仍在增加。“一个月内，我们消灭的占领者人数与他们动员的人数相同，但与此同时，他们在乌克兰的军事集团人数却在增加。也就是说，我们认为他们通过动员战略预备役的军事人员来增加兵力。我们与总司令及总参谋长讨论了如何应对这一问题，”泽连斯基告诉记者。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Ukraine will enter a difficult period of pressure from Russia on the front and the US in negotiations by September, Zelensky said. "If Russia chooses the path of de-escalation, I believe that a trilateral meeting will take place. And they will try to hold it in April, May or June. I think these are key months for them. And I think it will be very difficult for us until September. This spring-summer period will be challenging - both politically and diplomatically. There may be pressure on Ukraine. And it will also be on the battlefield," Zelensky said in an interview with journalists. He believes that if this pressure does not result in a solution, the US will withdraw from the negotiations before the Congress elections. "In my opinion, the Americans will not give anyone more time for this dialogue. The US will increasingly focus on internal processes - the elections - starting from the summer. And I think they have a kind of internal political deadline - roughly August," Zelensky said. He says that it is during this period that Russia may intensify its actions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将在9月前进入一个艰难时期，面临来自前线俄罗斯和谈判中美国的压力。“如果俄罗斯选择缓和局势的道路，我相信三方会议将会举行。他们会尝试在4月、5月或6月举行。我认为这对他们来说是关键的月份。我认为直到9月对我们来说都会非常困难。这个春夏时期将充满挑战——无论是在政治上还是外交上。乌克兰可能会面临压力。战场上也会如此，”泽连斯基在接受记者采访时说。他认为，如果这种压力不能带来解决方案，美国将在国会选举前退出谈判。“在我看来，美国人不会再给任何人时间进行这种对话了。从夏天开始，美国将越来越多地关注内部进程——选举。我认为他们有一个内部政治截止日期——大约在8月，”泽连斯基说。他说，正是在这段时期，俄罗斯可能会加强其行动。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel The IRGC denies carrying out any attack on Kuwait, stating its forces “have not launched any missiles at any country during the ceasefire.” It added, according to IRNA: “If these reports published by the media are true, it is undoubtedly the work of the Zionist enemy or the United States.” NOW 🔴 Kuwaiti Ministry of Defense: We are currently dealing with a drone attack targeting vital facilities in the country's territory. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队否认对科威特发动任何袭击，称其部队“在停火期间没有向任何国家发射过导弹”。据伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）报道，它补充说：“如果媒体报道的这些消息属实，那无疑是犹太复国主义敌人或美国的所作所为。” NOW 🔴 科威特国防部：我们目前正在处理一起针对该国境内重要设施的无人机袭击。 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTtechnical Ukraine secured air defense interceptors, crude oil, diesel fuel, and additional financial "arrangements" in exchange for helping Gulf countries shoot down Iranian drones -Zelensky tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：泽连斯基推文称，乌克兰以帮助海湾国家击落伊朗无人机为交换条件，获得了防空拦截器、原油、柴油和额外的财政“安排”。

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian specialists shot down Iranian Shahed attack drones across several Middle Eastern countries during the Iran War -President Zelensky The teams also directly integrated into Gulf countries' air defense systems, providing them with Ukrainian battle experience. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042494723441492164/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：乌克兰总统泽连斯基称，在伊朗战争期间，乌克兰专家在多个中东国家击落了伊朗“见证者”（Shahed）攻击型无人机。这些团队还直接整合到海湾国家的防空系统中，为他们提供了乌克兰的战斗经验。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042494723441492164/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir says Lebanon is now the main battlefield, stressing operations are ongoing: "The IDF is in a state of war, we are not in a ceasefire. We continue to fight here in this sector, this is our primary combat zone," He added: "In Iran, we are in a ceasefire, and we can return to fighting there at any moment, and in a very powerful way." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）中将表示，黎巴嫩现在是主要战场，并强调行动正在进行中：“以色列国防军处于战争状态，我们没有停火。我们继续在这个部门作战，这是我们的主要作战区。”他补充说：“在伊朗，我们处于停火状态，我们可以随时以非常强大的方式恢复战斗。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel WSJ: Beijing quietly steered Iran toward talks with Washington during the conflict, earning goodwill with both Xi and Trump ahead of their summit. China is now looking to cash in that leverage, with Xi expected to push Trump closer to Beijing’s position on Taiwan. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042492537777148230/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：《华尔街日报》：北京在冲突期间悄悄引导伊朗与华盛顿进行谈判，在峰会前赢得了习近平和特朗普双方的好感。中国现在正寻求兑现这一筹码，预计习近平将推动特朗普更接近中国在台湾问题上的立场。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042492537777148230/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Bloomberg: U.S. officials, including Scott Bessent and Jerome Powell, quietly briefed top Wall Street CEOs over concerns an Anthropic AI model (“Mythos”) could heighten cyberattack risks by identifying system vulnerabilities. Regulators are pushing banks to strengthen defenses, while access to the model remains restricted to a small group as safeguards are developed. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：彭博社：包括斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）和杰罗姆·鲍威尔（Jerome Powell）在内的美国官员悄悄向华尔街顶级CEO通报了担忧，称Anthropic AI模型（“Mythos”）可能通过识别系统漏洞而增加网络攻击风险。监管机构正在推动银行加强防御，而由于正在开发安全措施，该模型的访问权限仍仅限于一小部分人。 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 Trump endorses Orban again 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 特朗普再次背书欧尔班 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chief of Indian Army Staff General Upendra Dwivedi on 2025 India–Pakistan conflict: We made sure that when the people on the other side are going through that Namaz prayer in the terrorist camp, we said this time we'll not touch. Because God is one for everyone.
text_zh: 印度陆军参谋长乌彭德拉·德维迪（Upendra Dwivedi）将军谈及2025年印巴冲突：我们确保当对方的人在恐怖分子营地进行礼拜时，我们说这次我们不动手。因为上帝对每个人来说都是一样的。

text: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The number of settlers wounded in the Iranian and Hezbollah attacks has reached 8,000. Officials in the Zionist regime's Ministry of Health, who usually censor their casualty figures, reported today that during the war against Iran and Lebanon, 7,993 Zionists have been wounded.
text_zh: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在伊朗和真主党袭击中受伤的定居者人数已达8000人。犹太复国主义政权卫生部的官员（通常会审查其伤亡数字）今天报告称，在对伊朗和黎巴嫩的战争中，有7993名犹太复国主义者受伤。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The true face of Norman Finkelstein Lebanese have a right to be angry with Hezbollah over sacrifices made for Iran — Norman Finkelstein “They have a right to live… they didn’t want to be sacrificed. Hezbollah also had a responsibility to come to Iran’s aid… attacked by forces seeking to end its civilization.” - > Hezbollah exists because of the occupation. What Norman says about Hezbollah is wrong. Hezbollah was created in response to Israel’s occupation of Lebanon. And no, this footage is not fake or fabricated. Watch the full interview here.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 诺曼·芬克尔斯坦（Norman Finkelstein）的真面目：黎巴嫩人有权因伊朗做出的牺牲而对真主党感到愤怒——诺曼·芬克尔斯坦：“他们有权生存……他们不想被牺牲。真主党也有责任援助伊朗……受到寻求终结其文明的势力的攻击。” -> 真主党因占领而存在。诺曼关于真主党的说法是错误的。真主党是为了应对以色列对黎巴嫩的占领而创建的。而且不，这段录像不是伪造或捏造的。点击此处观看完整采访。

text: Reza Pahlavi: Everyone keeps asking: when will the Iranian people rise? I don’t say they will rise right away—but at the right moment.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：每个人都在问：伊朗人民何时会起义？我不是说他们会立即起义——但在合适的时机。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 Russian forces have introduced a new guided kamikaze drone, Geran-5, with speeds reportedly three times higher than the Shahed, and structurally closer to a small cruise missile. 🔹 Cruise speed ranges between 450–600 km/h, with a maximum of up to 650 km/h, making interception by air defense and mobile anti-air units more difficult. 🔺 Range: up to 950–1000 km. 🔺 Warhead: approximately 90 kg. 🔹 Footage reportedly shows a strike on energy infrastructure in the Sumy region carried out using this jet-powered drone. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇷🇺 俄罗斯军队推出了一种新型制导自杀式无人机“天竺葵-5”（Geran-5），据报道其速度是“见证者”的三倍，结构上更接近小型巡航导弹。🔹 巡航速度在450–600公里/小时之间，最高可达650公里/小时，这使得防空系统和移动防空部队更难拦截。🔺 航程：高达950–1000公里。🔺 弹头：约90公斤。🔹 据报道，录像显示了使用这种喷气式无人机对苏梅地区能源基础设施进行的打击。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Alex Jones on Donald Trump: "5-6 times a day, it's, "Oh, we won, it's over. No, it's gonna go on forever. Total destruction. I'll never let them have the Strait. Yes, we're giving up the Strait. I'm getting out of NATO. We're staying in NATO. And when you know people in early dementia, that is exactly what they do." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：亚历克斯·琼斯（Alex Jones）谈唐纳德·特朗普：“一天5-6次，他说‘哦，我们赢了，结束了。不，它会永远持续下去。彻底毁灭。我永远不会让他们得到海峡。是的，我们要放弃海峡。我要退出北约。我们要留在北约。’当你了解患有早期痴呆症的人时，这正是他们所做的。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Sen. John Fetterman: If you have to pick a side, pick our side. Pick civilization. Pick Israel. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042487054265712724/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：参议员约翰·费特曼（John Fetterman）：如果你必须选择一方，选择我们这一方。选择文明。选择以色列。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042487054265712724/video/1 推文

text: Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun to Chinese President Xi in Beijing: Today... I deeply feel the concerned gaze of the entire world. Kuomintang and the Communist Party to jointly promote the institutionalization of cross-strait peace. Based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence, the two sides should further plan and construct institutional and sustainable dialogue and cooperation mechanisms. To make the peaceful development of the two sides irreversible, and to fundamentally eliminate all root causes of conflict.
text_zh: 台湾反对党领袖陈丽文在北京对中国国家主席习近平表示：今天……我深切感受到全世界关切的目光。国民党与共产党共同推动两岸和平制度化。在坚持“九二共识”、反对“台独”的共同政治基础上，双方应进一步规划和构建制度化、可持续的对话与合作机制。使两岸和平发展不可逆转，从根本上消除一切冲突的根源。

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy confirmed for the first time that Ukrainian electronic warfare systems and interceptors were used to down Iranian Shahed drones in “several” Gulf countries hosting U.S. military infrastructure, FT reports. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042485688449257941/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据《金融时报》报道，乌克兰总统弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基首次证实，乌克兰的电子战系统和拦截器被用于在“几个”托管美国军事基础设施的海湾国家击落伊朗“见证者”无人机。由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042485688449257941/photo/1 推文

text: Reza Pahlavi: We never sought military intervention in our country.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：我们从未寻求对我国进行军事干预。

text: BIG: Chinese President Xi Jinping met Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun in Beijing: The leaders of the two parties are meeting today to safeguard the peace and tranquility of our shared home. To promote the peaceful development of cross-strait relations. We are willing, based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence... To seek peace for both sides of the strait, to seek well-being for our compatriots, and to seek rejuvenation for the nation. To firmly hold the future of cross-strait relations in the hands of the Chinese people themselves.
text_zh: 重磅：中国国家主席习近平在北京会见台湾反对党领袖陈丽文：两党领导人今天会面，是为了维护我们共同家园的和平与安宁。为了促进两岸关系的和平发展。我们愿意在坚持“九二共识”、反对“台独”的共同政治基础上……为两岸谋和平，为同胞谋福祉，为民族谋复兴。将两岸关系的未来牢牢掌握在中华民族自身手中。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Kamal Kharazi, Iran’s former foreign minister, was seriously wounded in an apparent assassination attempt on his home in Tehran that also killed his wife. Two Iranian officials told The New York Times that he had been overseeing engagement with Pakistan to…" Former Iranian Foreign Minister Kamal Kharazi has died at age 81 from wounds sustained in the April 1 strike in Tehran.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“伊朗前外交部长卡迈勒·哈拉齐（Kamal Kharazi）在德黑兰家中遭遇明显的暗杀企图，身受重伤，其妻子也在袭击中丧生。两名伊朗官员告诉《纽约时报》，他一直在监督与巴基斯坦的接触，以……” 伊朗前外交部长卡迈勒·哈拉齐因4月1日在德黑兰遇袭受伤，已于81岁去世。

text: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung: The forced comfort women issue that we are raising is no different from the Jewish massacre or wartime killings.
text_zh: 韩国总统李在明：我们提出的强征慰安妇问题，与犹太人大屠杀或战时杀戮没有什么不同。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Scott Bessent and Jerome Powell quietly called in top Wall Street CEOs after concerns that a new AI model from Anthropic could significantly raise cyberattack risks. The model, called Mythos, is reportedly capable of identifying and exploiting weaknesses in major systems, raising fears that it could be used for more advanced hacking. Regulators wanted to ensure banks are aware of the threat and are strengthening their defenses. For now, access to the model is limited to a small group of companies while security measures are being worked out. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 斯科特·贝森特和杰罗姆·鲍威尔在担忧Anthropic的一款新AI模型可能显著增加网络攻击风险后，悄悄召集了华尔街顶级CEO。该模型名为Mythos，据报道有能力识别和利用主要系统中的弱点，引发了人们对其可能被用于更高级黑客攻击的担忧。监管机构希望确保银行意识到这一威胁并加强防御。目前，由于安全措施正在制定中，该模型的访问权限仅限于一小部分公司。来源：彭博社

text: Benny Johnson: Netanyahu should be banned from the White House.
text_zh: 本尼·约翰逊（Benny Johnson）：内塔尼亚胡应该被禁止进入白宫。

text: Alex Jones on Trump: 5-6 times a day, it's, "Oh, we won, it's over. No, it's gonna go on forever. I'll never let them have the Strait. Yes, we're giving up the Strait. I'm getting out of NATO. We're staying in NATO." When you know people in early dementia, that is exactly what they do.
text_zh: 亚历克斯·琼斯谈特朗普：一天5-6次，他说“哦，我们赢了，结束了。不，它会永远持续下去。我永远不会让他们得到海峡。是的，我们要放弃海峡。我要退出北约。我们要留在北约。”当你了解患有早期痴呆症的人时，这正是他们所做的。

text: Hunter Biden wants a cage match with Donald Trump's sons Eric and Don Jr.
text_zh: 亨特·拜登想要与唐纳德·特朗普的儿子埃里克和小唐纳德进行一场笼斗。

text: BIG: China quietly pushed Iran toward U.S. talks during the war, gaining diplomatic credit with Xi and Trump. Beijing’s goal: build leverage ahead of their summit, where Xi is expected to press Trump to move closer to China’s position that Taiwan is a breakaway province that should ultimately reunify with the mainland. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 重磅：中国在战争期间悄悄推动伊朗与美国进行谈判，在习近平和特朗普那里获得了外交信誉。北京的目标：在峰会前建立筹码，预计习近平将在峰会上向特朗普施压，使其更接近中国的立场，即台湾是一个应该最终与大陆统一的脱离省份。来源：《华尔街日报》

text: Sen. John Fetterman: If you have to pick a side, pick our side. Pick civilization. Pick Israel.
text_zh: 参议员约翰·费特曼：如果你必须选择一方，选择我们这一方。选择文明。选择以色列。

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: Netanyahu wanted us to strike Iran. He came to President Obama. He made a presentation to ask to strike. President Obama refused. President Biden refused. President Bush refused. The only president who has agreed to this, obviously, is President Trump.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿约翰·克里（John Kerry）：内塔尼亚胡曾希望我们打击伊朗。他来到奥巴马总统面前。他做了一个演示，要求进行打击。奥巴马总统拒绝了。拜登总统拒绝了。布什总统拒绝了。显然，唯一同意这样做的总统是特朗普总统。

text: Trump: Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable some would say, of allowing Oil to go through the Strait of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have!,
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，有些人会说是无耻的。那不是我们达成的协议！

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦💥 More from Odessa 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 The Odessa authorities stated that drones attacked the energy and port infrastructure in the Odessa region. As a result of the attacks port equipment were damaged. Power outages were also reported. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇨🇳 Xi Jinping meets with Taiwan's opposition leader Cheng Li-Wun 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇨🇳 习近平会见台湾反对党领袖陈丽文 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 "The bills go up and down because of the actions of Putin or Trump" - Starmer 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 “账单的涨跌是因为普京或特朗普的行为” - 斯塔默 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
